title: Google Cloud Dataflow Template
description: Metadata describing a Dataflow template, including its name, description, parameters, and streaming capability. Templates define reusable pipeline structures that can be launched with different runtime parameters.

name.description: Required. The name of the template.

description.description: Optional. A description of the template.

parameters.description: The parameters for the template, defining inputs that can be configured at launch time.

streaming.description: If true, this template processes unbounded data streams.

supportsAtLeastOnce.description: If true, this template supports at-least-once processing.

supportsExactlyOnce.description: If true, this template supports exactly-once processing.

defaultStreamingMode.description: The default streaming mode for the template.

ParameterMetadata.description: Metadata for a specific parameter used by a template.

name.description: Required. The name of the parameter.

label.description: Required. The label to display for the parameter.

helpText.description: Required. Help text to display for the parameter.

isOptional.description: Optional. Whether the parameter is optional. Defaults to false.

regexes.description: Optional. Regular expressions used to validate the parameter value.
